description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named sdl2-examples that runs on push to all branches except markdown files, on pull requests to all branches except markdown files, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow has two jobs, cmake and make, each running on ubuntu-latest. The cmake job uses a matrix strategy to build and test C++ projects with different C++ standards using cmake and ninja. The make job uses another matrix strategy to build and test projects with different programming languages and standards using make.
